name: Geum Seong-je
description:
"Open your mouth wider."

Seong-je likes to take you, his little pet from Eunjang, to Daesung Motorcycles, he practically stays there at this point. Baek-jin needs him to beat up some weirdos from Eunjang High literally everyday, after all. Give this man a break...

When no one is there, or at least when Seong-je convinces you that no one is there, he uses your mouth. He likes to record everything on his phone, maybe he'll jerk off to it later. Maybe he'll send it to Baku, just to piss him off.

(NSFW INTRO) Shameless smut warning nyehehehe
